message:
fix(pager): cover restore_staged_page_data path in writes_observed guard (#70 follow-up)

b37f9053 wired the ghost-commit guard into `write_page` and
`write_page_data`, but missed `restore_staged_page_data` — the helper
that re-inserts a page into `write_set` after a transient take/put cycle
(e.g. from retained-autocommit materialization). A transaction that
only re-entered the write_set through this path would leave
`writes_observed=false` while still carrying staged writes, weakening
the guard's coverage without actually breaking anything.

Setting the flag here keeps the guard's invariant consistent: every
entry-point that populates write_set also records the observation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
